name: Macquarie Transaction Account
one_liner: Zero-fee everyday account with no FX fees and a well-regarded mobile app.
benefit: No monthly fees, no foreign transaction fees on the debit card, no international ATM fees at eligible overseas ATMs; pairs with Macquarie Savings Account for competitive bonus interest; highly rated digital experience.

how_to_join.detail: Requires AU mobile number, email, TFN, and identification (passport or driver's licence).

how_to_join.action: Download the Macquarie app and add your card to Apple Pay or Google Pay
Optionally open a Macquarie Savings Account to earn bonus interest
how_to_join.detail: Bonus interest requires meeting monthly deposit conditions — check current terms.

risks: Fully digital bank — no physical branches
Bonus interest on savings requires meeting monthly deposit conditions
International ATM fee-free access applies at specific ATM networks; verify before travelling
est_value: Saves ~$5/month in account fees + ~2–3% FX fee savings on overseas purchases
